heading: Step 4:  Add search options to your $search stage to retrieve additional information about your  query.
body:
You can retrieve additional information about your [$search](pipe.$search) stage results using the following options:

| Option      | Use Case                                                                                                                                                            |
| ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| highlight   | Display your search terms in their original context as fields in your query result.                                                                                 |
| scoreDetail | Retrieve a detailed breakdown of the score for each document MongoDB Search returns.                                                                                |
| explain     | Retrieve analytics about which Lucene queries MongoDB Search executed to satify your query, and how much time your query spends in the various stages of execution. |
